task_title: Upgrade PruneMem public repo to express V4.1
goal: Finish a public-safe repository release without leaking private runtime details.
user_request_summary: Publicly document and ship the safe V4/V4.1 abstractions.
constraints: Do not leak private logs, keys, machine-specific paths, or real workspace details.
Prefer generalized hook contracts over internal event copies.
decisions_confirmed: Keep long-term memory separate from working memory.
Document V4 and V4.1 as layered runtime abstractions.
open_questions: Should the public release include stricter JSON Schema files next?
completed_steps: Audit repository baseline and inspect private references for safe abstractions.
in_progress_steps: Update docs, examples, and changelog for public V4.1 release.
